info.title: Recuring Mobile API v1
info.description:
REST API for the Recuring field-operator mobile application.

**Authentication** — pass the session token from `POST /auth/login` as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

**CSRF protection** — all mutation endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE) require the `X-CSRF-Token` header obtained from `GET /auth/me`.

**Rate limits** — mobile org bucket is 10× the standard org bucket.

**Spec endpoint** — `GET /api/mobile/v1/openapi.json` (no auth required).

tags.name: jobs
tags.description: Service job lifecycle and proof management

token.description: Session token — send as Authorization: Bearer <token>

csrfToken.description: Pass as X-CSRF-Token header on all mutations

JobProof.description: A proof photo attached to a job

uploadUrl.description: Presigned S3 PUT URL — valid for 5 min

getUrl.description: Presigned GET URL — valid for 15 min

post.summary: Login with phone or employee_id + password

get.summary: Return current session user and a fresh CSRF token

csrfToken.description: Included on first call; refresh periodically

post.summary: Send a 6-digit OTP to the given phone number
Verify OTP and return a session token

200.description: OTP verified — same shape as POST /auth/login

get.summary: List jobs assigned to the authenticated technician
Get a single job with customer and asset detail

post.summary: Transition job status (en_route → arrived → in_progress → completed)
post.description: The `arrived` status is a virtual transition that maps internally to `en_route` and appends a marker to the service report.

post.summary: Cancel / fail a job with a mandatory reason
Reschedule a job to a different date
Update the service report / work notes for a job

get.summary: List all proof photos for a job

200.description: Proof list with pre-signed GET URLs

post.summary: Attach a proof photo to a job
post.description: Workflow: `POST /uploads/sign` → PUT to `uploadUrl` → `POST /jobs/{id}/proofs` with the returned `key`.

delete.summary: Delete a proof photo from a job

get.summary: List complaints assigned to the authenticated technician
Get a single complaint with full timeline, customer, and asset detail

post.summary: Transition a complaint status (in_progress, on_hold, resolved)
Create a service job from an existing complaint
Register or refresh a push notification token
Get a presigned S3 PUT URL for uploading a proof image
post.description: Verify the caller owns the resource before issuing the URL. PUT to `uploadUrl` within 5 min, then POST the `key` to `/jobs/{id}/proofs`.

ext.description: File extension without dot, e.g. jpg
